MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2002 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2002 Continued To Aug-19-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 613 (for Dept. 218), Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk Jose Rios-Merida, Plaintiff's attorney David G. Mendez, defendant in pro per Mireya Segura, and defendant in pro per Carrie Fischer, present.

The Cause is called for settlement conference. The court and the parties confer in chambers. The case does not settle. The matter is taken off the settlement conference calendar.

The trial date remains.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2002 Off Calendar
